creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 231203
Screenshot: two scroll bars, one of which has an invisible boundary

Discovered whilst reporting bug 261370.

With a user style that places the sidebar to the left: 

<https://forums.freebsd.org/attachments/2022-01-21-04-09-20-png.12659/>

Without the user style: 

<https://forums.freebsd.org/attachments/1642744899822-png.12660/>

Bug: 

* it's not clear that the wrong scroll bar has been dragged 
  until after its _invisible_ limit has been reached. 

I instinctively dragged the inner bar to reach what's below the table of contents. 

Other accessibility observations: the inner bar is too narrow.
